risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to high heat dissipation from avionics.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management solutions such as heat sinks and thermal vias.

risk.desc: Risk of structural failure under high launch loads.
risk.mit: Conduct stress analysis and reinforce critical areas.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference between avionics and payload.
risk.mit: Ensure proper shielding and grounding of electrical components.

risk.desc: Risk of deployment failure due to mechanical misalignment.
risk.mit: Conduct deployment tests and adjust mechanisms as necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of service access panel detachment during operation.
risk.mit: Use robust fastening and locking mechanisms.

flow_path: electrical signals from avionics to payload via PC/104 stack
thermal_path: heat dissipation from avionics to outer surface
motion_path: deployable rail guides for solar panel deployment
pressure_path: internal pressure from battery bay to frame
human_service_path: access to avionics via removable tray
